penalties.description: Task was not completed - not all objects were successfully transferred in both directions as required by FLS Peg Transfer protocol.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: Both models agreed on completion time (133 seconds) and that the task was not completed successfully. While Claude identified this as a different exercise entirely, GPT-4o recognized it as an incomplete Peg Transfer attempt. The consensus applies the incomplete_task penalty resulting in automatic zero score, as the FLS protocol requires all six objects to be transferred bidirectionally for successful completion.
